headline: Arctic Ice Sheet Thinning Accelerates by 18%
summary: Satellite data shows accelerated thinning of Arctic permafrost layers in Q1 2026.
ai_insight: Satellite observations indicate accelerated Arctic warming and continued ice loss. Long-term impacts include rising sea levels, ecosystem disruption and altered climate patterns.

headline: Unusual Seismic Cluster Detected — Pacific Ring of Fire
summary: A cluster of 40+ micro-earthquakes recorded in 48h along the Cascadia subduction zone.
ai_insight: Persistent microseismic activity has been observed along the Cascadia subduction zone. No immediate large rupture is indicated, but elevated monitoring is recommended.
